faq.question: How much does window replacement cost in San Rafael?
faq.answer: For San Rafael homes, with the current promotion quality vinyl replacement starts at $549 per window installed (regular $915), while fiberglass, clad-wood and architectural products price higher. Deluxe Windows itemizes product, labor and permits in a written San Rafael quote after free on-site measurements.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to replace windows in San Rafael?
faq.answer: Permitting: San Rafael follows standard California permitting, confirmed per project scope. Deluxe Windows verifies requirements with the building department and manages the paperwork for San Rafael installations.

faq.question: Which window brands work best for San Rafael homes?
faq.answer: Popular choices in San Rafael include Milgard, Anlin and Simonton vinyl for value, and Marvin or Andersen for premium projects. The right pick depends on the home's age, style and exposure in San Rafael.

faq.question: How long does window replacement take in San Rafael?
faq.answer: Most San Rafael projects are measured in one visit and installed in one to three working days once windows arrive, typically four to eight weeks after ordering.

faq.question: How do I book a free window replacement estimate in San Rafael?
faq.answer: Call or send the project details online and a Deluxe Windows consultant visits the San Rafael home, measures every opening and prepares a written installed quote — the visit is free and there is no obligation to order.
